steps.t: The vineyard can be found west of the Beorninghús. You should gather some grapes for making jam.
The grape tub can be found at the Beorninghús. You should place the grapes that you have collected into the tub.
The wash bucket can be found at the Beorninghús. You should wash your feet before stomping on grapes.
The grape tub can be found at the Beorninghús. You should stomp on the grapes.
The grape tub can be found at the Beorninghús. You should remove the crushed grapes from the tub.
A honey jar can be found at the Beorninghús. You should add the crushed grapes to the jar.
Gírta can be found at the Beorninghús. You should bring the jam to Gírta.
